overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning under a covered overpass with glowing digital billboards, transitioning through a brightly lit plaza featuring massive illuminated advertisements on a building facade, and continuing into a darker concrete tunnel. The environment features wet reflective pavement, neon lighting, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game world.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with digital advertising

events.description: dark vehicle passes by on the right side road
approaching the brightly illuminated plaza area ahead, light levels increasing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under the concrete overpass, heading toward the glowing plaza in the distance

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving past on the multi-lane road to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overhead structure creating a covered walkway
large illuminated advertisement showing a figure in red clothing
large digital display showing food advertisement with '35' visible
metal bollards separating the pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass with wet pavement reflecting the glow of digital billboards on both sides. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing by a road with sparse vehicle traffic on the right, heading toward a brightly lit area in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with massive illuminated building facade featuring vertical neon strips

events.description: exiting the darker overpass into the brightly lit plaza with the large illuminated building
pedestrians cross the path from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past the massive illuminated building with FERUDO advertisements, navigating around crossing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in colorful clothing walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: massive building facade with vertical light strips and three large FERUDO advertisements showing figures on bicycles
wall of multiple digital screens displaying various advertisements
rectangular concrete seating blocks along the left side of the walkway
large angled architectural concrete support beam on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a dramatic plaza dominated by a massive building with glowing vertical neon strips and large FERUDO advertisements. The wet pavement reflects the golden light from the building. Pedestrians walk through the plaza while vehicles pass on the right, and the camera continues forward past concrete benches and architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian tunnel underpass with concrete walls

events.description: entering the darker tunnel after passing the illuminated building
moving deeper into the tunnel where lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker concrete tunnel toward the distant exit light, with few other people visible ahead

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the underpass tunnel on both sides
flat concrete ceiling of the underpass extending into the distance
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a darker, enclosed concrete tunnel with smooth walls and a flat ceiling. The lighting drops significantly, with only the distant exit light and sparse artificial lights illuminating the path. The camera continues walking forward through the underpass, leaving the bright plaza behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim urban underpass through a brilliant neon plaza and into a dark concrete tunnel. It begins beneath a dark concrete overpass where wet pavement reflects the glow of digital billboards, moving forward past sparse vehicle traffic toward a distant light. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a dramatic plaza dominated by a massive building with glowing vertical neon strips and golden FERUDO advertisements that illuminate the reflective ground and passing pedestrians. The camera continues past concrete benches and architectural elements before the environment shifts abruptly into a darker, enclosed concrete tunnel. The lighting drops significantly as the camera moves through the smooth-walled underpass, leaving the bright plaza behind and heading toward a distant exit light.
